video.description: Source RGB video (.mp4) used as the motion and audio source. HTTP(S) URL or data URI.

images.description: Identity reference image(s), 1 to 3, to place into the video. Each entry is an HTTP(S) URL or a data URI.

turbo.description: Turbo mode: faster generation for slightly lower quality.

target_fps.description: Target FPS for the working video.

instruction_prompt.description: Further instruction on how to place people from the reference images into the scene.

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated videos.
